prompt: Design a dramatic square promotional poster in the style of a TV sitcom cast transfer announcement, with a dark navy and black office-themed background, gritty sports-poster energy, bold blue paint strokes, white distressed typography, and layered collage composition. At the center, place a confident woman named Penny standing from the waist up with arms crossed, wearing a light cream floral V-neck dress, messy blonde hair in a high bun, softly rim-lit with a subtle glow around her silhouette. Behind her, show exactly 8 office coworkers arranged as a blurred ensemble cast in staggered rows inside a corporate office interior with blinds, desks, and framed company signage; keep them secondary and slightly shadowed so the central woman dominates the composition. At the top left, include a tilted blue company logo block reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN INC. PAPER COMPANY" with a small office icon. Across the top center, add a huge distressed white headline "TRANSFER" and beneath it an even larger blue brush-script word "CONFIRMED". At the top right, add the small stacked slogan "NEW CHAPTER. NEW SCRANTON." On the left side, place a torn-paper transfer slip with a stamped, photocopied look; it should contain exactly 2 labeled sections, "FROM:" with "DUNDER MIFFLIN PAPER COMPANY, SCRANTON, PA, EST. 1949" and "TO:" with "THE OFFICE, SCRANTON, PA", plus a small office icon at the bottom. Add a hand-drawn blue arrow from this slip pointing toward the central woman. Across the woman's torso, place a blue paint-stroke nameplate with "Penny" in white script, followed by a small black strip with "IS", then a large stacked headline in distressed white and blue block text reading "JOINING THE OFFICE". On the right side, add a glowing dark info panel with exactly 3 labeled lines: "NEW ROLE" with "SALES REPRESENTATIVE", "NEW TEAM" with "SAME PAPER", and "NEW MEMORIES" with "LOADING...", plus a horizontal progress bar beneath. Along the bottom center, include a narrow blue banner reading "DUNDER MIFFLIN, INC. WELCOMES Penny". At the very bottom, create a footer strip with exactly 4 elements: a briefcase icon and "NEW JOB", a team icon and "NEW TEAM", a document icon and "NEW MEMORIES", and on the far right a handwritten blue script phrase "LET'S GO!". Use a high-contrast blue-white-black palette, cinematic compositing, subtle dust and texture overlays, energetic paint smears, and a premium fan-edit social media announcement aesthetic.
